title: signal SIGSEGV: invalid address in final block

features.name: large automatic array in function called from final block
features.description: Code should include an automatic function containing a large unpacked array (exceeding 2^18 elements) that is invoked from a final block

features.name: automatic function with large typedef-based unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an automatic function with a large unpacked array using a typedef of multi-bit type, where the array size is 2^19 or larger

features.name: writememh with large automatic array from final context
features.description: Code should include a $writememh system task operating on a large unpacked array that resides in an automatic function called from a final block
